faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Pet Movie AI
faq.tip: Still have questions? Contact our support team

items.question: How does Pet Movie AI work?
items.answer: Upload a photo or video of your pet, choose a template, and our AI generates a cinematic short film (25s or 50s) with music, transitions, and effects. In 5-10 minutes, you'll have a ready-to-share pet movie.

items.question: What length options are available?
items.answer: We offer two formats: 25-second short films and 50-second short films. Choose the length that best fits your needs when creating your pet movie.

items.question: What templates can I choose from?
items.answer: We offer multiple cinematic templates with different styles and moods. Each template includes professionally curated music, transitions, and visual effects optimized for pet content.

items.question: What video formats are supported?
items.answer: We support JPG, PNG for photos and MP4, MOV for videos. Maximum file size is 100MB per upload.

items.question: How long does processing take?
items.answer: Most 25s and 50s pet films are ready in 5-10 minutes. You'll receive a notification when your movie is ready to preview and download.

items.question: Can I edit the generated movie?
items.answer: The AI generates a finalized short film optimized for the selected template. If you'd like different results, you can regenerate with a different template or upload different content.

items.question: What's included in the free beta trial?
items.answer: During beta testing, new users receive 5 free credits (good for 1 free video generation) upon sign-up. This is a one-time trial with no time limit. Paid plans will be available after beta testing concludes.

items.question: What about music licensing and copyright?
items.answer: Videos are AI-generated using Sora 2 technology. Background music is from royalty-free libraries licensed for personal and social media use. For commercial use (ads, monetized YouTube), see our Terms of Service for details.
